\tzpentry{ID3594}{Self Potential Energy Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3594 introduces Self Potential Energy Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} U_{\text{self}}(d) = -\frac{\mu_0 \mu_0^2}{2\pi d^3} \left(1 + 3\cos^2\theta\right) \end{equation}
